disc_animalism.name: Bond Famulus
disc_animalism.summary: bond an animal companion. It will listen to basic commands, but full communication is not possible (unless you have Feral Whispers)

disc_animalism.name: Sense the Beast
disc_animalism.summary: sense hostility and supernatural traits in people

disc_animalism.name: Animal Messenger
disc_animalism.summary: send your famulus to deliver a short spoken message in your voice

disc_animalism.name: Atavism
disc_animalism.summary: make an animal enrage or flee

disc_animalism.name: Feral Whispers
disc_animalism.summary: communicate with animals. You can also call for animals and if they are nearby, they will come.

disc_animalism.name: Leash the Beast
disc_animalism.summary: spend vitae to soften a critical, bestial failure, or failed frenzy resistance die

disc_animalism.name: Animal Succulence
disc_animalism.summary: Feed more effectively on animals. You can consume your famulus to temporarily gain their aspect

disc_animalism.name: Augury
disc_animalism.summary: force a swarm, flock, or school to form an answer to one question about its range

disc_animalism.name: Awaken the Parasite
disc_animalism.summary: make vermin erupt inside a nearby body, harming speech, focus, and mortal survival

disc_animalism.name: Messenger's Command
disc_animalism.summary: send Compel or Mesmerize through a message delivered by your famulus

disc_animalism.name: Plague of Beasts
disc_animalism.summary: mark a target so nearby animals harass them and make them easier to track

disc_animalism.name: Quell the Beast
disc_animalism.summary: Shut down a target's drives and desires, pull vampires out of frenzy

disc_animalism.name: Scent of Prey
disc_animalism.summary: Detect Mortals who saw Masquerade breaches

disc_animalism.name: Unliving Hive
disc_animalism.summary: extend animal influence to swarms of insects, treating a swarm as a single creature

disc_animalism.name: Subsume the Spirit
disc_animalism.summary: transfer your mind into an animal's body, controlling it and using its senses

disc_animalism.name: Sway the Flock
disc_animalism.summary: shift the mood of animals across a large area toward calm or aggression

disc_animalism.name: Animal Dominion
disc_animalism.summary: command flocks and packs of animals as extensions of your own body

disc_animalism.name: Coax the Bestial Temper
disc_animalism.summary: subtly raise or lower the frenzy difficulty of nearby vampires while you hum or growl

disc_animalism.name: Drawing Out the Beast
disc_animalism.summary: project your Beast at the moment of frenzy, transferring it into a nearby subject

disc_animalism.name: Spirit Walk
disc_animalism.summary: prerequisite: Subsume the Spirit. When using Subsume the Spirit, duration is always indefinite as though a Critical was obtained. You can also activate Subsume the Spirit while already inhabiting an animal, transferring your consciousness from beast to beast without returning to your own body.

disc_auspex.name: Heightened Senses
disc_auspex.summary: your senses become supernaturally sharp; add Auspex rating to perception rolls

disc_auspex.name: Panacea
disc_auspex.summary: heal another person's Willpower damage and calm mortal distress

disc_auspex.name: Reveal Temperament
disc_auspex.summary: smell a target's resonance, dyscrasias, or a vampire's last victim

disc_auspex.name: Unerring Pursuit
disc_auspex.summary: create a bond with a target to spy on them

disc_auspex.name: Haruspex
disc_auspex.summary: read a fresh death to prepare for one later dice pool with a potent reroll

disc_auspex.name: Share the Senses
disc_auspex.summary: sense through another person (eg. see through their eyes)

disc_auspex.name: Heart Laid Bare
disc_auspex.summary: learn a target's strongest hidden fear or desire through conversation

disc_auspex.name: Spirit's Touch
disc_auspex.summary: sense emotional residue left by those who handled an object or visited a location

disc_auspex.name: Clairvoyance
disc_auspex.summary: gather information from a city-block sized area through mystical connection

disc_auspex.name: Possession
disc_auspex.summary: strip the will of a mortal and completely possess their body

disc_auspex.name: Telepathy
disc_auspex.summary: read minds and project thoughts into the minds of others

disc_auspex.name: Unburdening the Bestial Soul
disc_auspex.summary: remove another vampire's Stains or shield them from future Stains, at a cost

disc_blood_sorcery.name: A Taste for Blood
disc_blood_sorcery.summary: Discern traits about someone by tasting a drop of their blood

disc_blood_sorcery.name: Corrosive Vitae
disc_blood_sorcery.summary: make your blood corrosive to dead substances

disc_blood_sorcery.name: Shape of the Sanguine Sacrament
disc_blood_sorcery.summary: manipulate blood to show simple messages or shapes

disc_blood_sorcery.name: Blood's Curse
disc_blood_sorcery.summary: temporarily thicken a target's Blood; on a win add 2 (or 4 on critical) to the victim's Blood Potency for Bane severity and feeding penalty only; ghouls, Caitiff, and thin-bloods gain a Bane based on the clan they most recently fed from
disc_blood_sorcery.dice_pool: Intelligence + Blood Sorcery vs Stamina + Occult or Fortitude

disc_blood_sorcery.name: Scorpion's Touch
disc_blood_sorcery.summary: turn your blood into paralyzing poison

disc_blood_sorcery.name: Transitive Bond
disc_blood_sorcery.summary: your blood can retain Blood Bonding properties even when stored in an object or a ghoul

disc_blood_sorcery.name: Blood Aegis
disc_blood_sorcery.summary: form your vitae into a floating barrier that absorbs ranged damage

disc_blood_sorcery.name: Fulminating Vitae
disc_blood_sorcery.summary: charge a vial of your Blood to burst into cutting shrapnel when broken

disc_blood_sorcery.name: Marionette
disc_blood_sorcery.summary: puppet spilled blood or a living victim's blood into violent physical action

disc_blood_sorcery.name: Theft of Vitae
disc_blood_sorcery.summary: open a wound in a major artery of a mortal victim, blood shooting out toward your open mouth

disc_blood_sorcery.name: Baal's Caress
disc_blood_sorcery.summary: transmute your Blood into an extremely aggressive poison, lethal to mortal and Kindred alike

disc_blood_sorcery.name: Cauldron of Blood
disc_blood_sorcery.summary: boil the blood of a victim in their own veins, doing aggravated damage per margin over their Composure + Occult roll

disc_blood_sorcery.name: Reclamation of Vitae
disc_blood_sorcery.summary: call back vitae from your ghouls at any distance, sating Hunger while harming them

disc_celerity.name: Fluent Swiftness
disc_celerity.summary: when you Blood Surge to augment a Dexterity or Celerity test, you may reroll the Rouse Check

disc_celerity.name: Fleetness
disc_celerity.summary: add Celerity rating for defense and Dexterity rolls

disc_celerity.name: Rush Job
disc_celerity.summary: perform non-combat skill tasks in seconds or as minor actions

disc_celerity.name: A Thousand Cuts
disc_celerity.summary: add Celerity to a claw or edged attack that leaves victims bleeding and exposed

disc_celerity.name: Blink
disc_celerity.summary: dash up to 50m at supernatural speed

disc_celerity.name: Weaving
disc_celerity.summary: add Celerity rating to defense against ranged (Requires 'Rapid Reflexes')

disc_celerity.name: Blurred Momentum
disc_celerity.summary: move as a blur so weak attacks miss even when you cannot defend

disc_celerity.name: Draught of Elegance
disc_celerity.summary: convey temporary Celerity power to anyone who drinks your Blood

disc_celerity.name: Faster Than Light
disc_celerity.summary: use Blink to cross a brief patch of fire or sunlight without taking damage

disc_celerity.name: Unerring Aim
disc_celerity.summary: aim and fire any weapon at a target as if the target were stationary

disc_celerity.name: Unseen Strike
disc_celerity.summary: vanish, instantly close with an enemy, and potentially strike as a surprise attack

disc_celerity.name: Lightning Strike
disc_celerity.summary: strike with fist or melee weapon at such speed that the opponent cannot defend

disc_celerity.name: Split Second
disc_celerity.summary: react to events at a moment's notice, superseding the Storyteller's narration

disc_dominate.name: Cloud Memory
disc_dominate.summary: make a person forget the past minute

disc_dominate.name: Compel
disc_dominate.summary: a single, short command with an immediate effect

disc_dominate.name: Dementation
disc_dominate.summary: trigger psychotic breaks or nervous breakdowns in others

disc_dominate.name: Domitor's Favor
disc_dominate.summary: make it harder for thralls to resist you

disc_dominate.name: Slavish Devotion
disc_dominate.summary: strengthen the mind of your dominated victims against interference from other kindred

disc_dominate.name: The Stolen Voice
disc_dominate.summary: silence a victim so speech, writing, gestures, and other communication fail

disc_dominate.name: Implant Suggestion
disc_dominate.summary: temporarily alter a target's desires, opinions, or intentions

disc_dominate.name: Submerged Directive
disc_dominate.summary: When using Mesmerize you can give a command that stays dormant until triggered (requires Mesmerize)

disc_dominate.name: Ancestral Dominion
disc_dominate.summary: command a descendant through the Blood, even without eye contact or spoken orders

disc_dominate.name: Rationalize
disc_dominate.summary: victims believe anything they do under Dominate was their own free will

disc_dominate.name: Tabula Rasa
disc_dominate.summary: erase a restrained victim's memories and identity while leaving skills and powers

disc_dominate.name: Lethe's Call
disc_dominate.summary: prerequisite: Cloud Memory or The Forgetful Mind. No eye contact needed. Each success margin wipes up to a week's worth of memories. With a verbal command, instead erase all knowledge of one person or event from the same period. Mortals cannot resist. Can leave memory blank or replace with a vague sense of time having passed.

disc_dominate.name: Mass Manipulation
disc_dominate.summary: amplify any Dominate power to affect a group of people at once

disc_dominate.name: Terminal Decree
disc_dominate.summary: issue commands that directly lead to the harm or death of the victim

disc_fortitude.name: Fluent Endurance
disc_fortitude.summary: when you Blood Surge to augment a Stamina or Fortitude test, you may reroll the Rouse Check

disc_fortitude.name: Resilience
disc_fortitude.summary: add Fortitude rating to health track

disc_fortitude.name: Earth's Perseverance
disc_fortitude.summary: root yourself in place so only you can choose to move

disc_fortitude.name: Enduring Beasts
disc_fortitude.summary: share a portion of your unnatural toughness with animals you influence

disc_fortitude.name: Invigorating Vitae
disc_fortitude.summary: your vitae heals living beings more effectively than normal

disc_fortitude.name: Self-Assurance
disc_fortitude.summary: absorb superficial Willpower damage during social conflict before it reaches you

disc_fortitude.name: Valeren
disc_fortitude.summary: use your blood to heal other vampires

disc_fortitude.name: Calloused Soul
disc_fortitude.summary: commit a planned atrocity to numb your conscience against further Stains that night

disc_fortitude.name: Draught of Endurance
disc_fortitude.summary: convey temporary Fortitude power to anyone who drinks your Blood

disc_fortitude.name: Gorgon's Scales
disc_fortitude.summary: use your last-fed resonance for a specific defense against banes or powers

disc_fortitude.name: Shatter
disc_fortitude.summary: while Toughness is active, reflect some absorbed damage back into attackers or weapons

disc_fortitude.name: Flesh of Marble
disc_fortitude.summary: harden your skin to marble-like sheen, ignoring the first source of physical damage each turn

disc_fortitude.name: Meat Shields
disc_fortitude.summary: draw strength from weak or injured mortals nearby, temporarily raising Fortitude

disc_fortitude.name: Prowess from Pain
disc_fortitude.summary: you no longer suffer dice penalties from health damage. Activate to increase a physical stat by 1 for each damaged health

disc_obfuscate.name: Cloak of Shadows
disc_obfuscate.summary: blend into surroundings while motionless

disc_obfuscate.name: Ensconce
disc_obfuscate.summary: conceal a number of small held or carried objects equal to your Obfuscate rating; mortals ignore or miss them in a search; Kindred with Sense the Unseen can still detect them; objects in plain view or animate creatures cannot be hidden

disc_obfuscate.name: Mask of Ages
disc_obfuscate.summary: make yourself appear significantly older or younger until dawn

disc_obfuscate.name: Silence of Death
disc_obfuscate.summary: mute all sounds you make

disc_obfuscate.name: Cache
disc_obfuscate.summary: prerequisite: Ensconce. Objects need only be touched, not held or carried; you need not maintain contact. Lasts one scene; an additional Rouse Check extends the effect until dawn.

disc_obfuscate.name: Chimerstry
disc_obfuscate.summary: create brief sensory hallucinations

disc_obfuscate.name: Ghost's Passing
disc_obfuscate.summary: extend your obfuscate powers to animals under your influence

disc_obfuscate.name: Unseen Passage
disc_obfuscate.summary: move while remaining hidden

disc_obfuscate.name: Fata Morgana
disc_obfuscate.summary: create an elaborate multi-sense hallucination that affects everyone who perceives it

disc_obfuscate.name: Ghost in the Machine
disc_obfuscate.summary: Obfuscate affects technology (eg. hide yourself from recordings)

disc_obfuscate.name: Guise of the Departed
disc_obfuscate.summary: touch a recent corpse to copy their appearance, bearing, and mannerisms until dawn

disc_obfuscate.name: Mask of a Thousand Faces
disc_obfuscate.summary: make yourself appear as a non-descript stranger to others

disc_obfuscate.name: Mask of Isolation
disc_obfuscate.summary: make a victim appear unrecognizable even to those who know them well

disc_obfuscate.name: Mental Maze
disc_obfuscate.summary: prevent someone from perceiving any exits or means of escape

disc_obfuscate.name: Mind Masque
disc_obfuscate.summary: hide your real mind behind a crafted false persona against supernatural reading

disc_obfuscate.name: Conceal
disc_obfuscate.summary: cloak an inanimate object such as a door, car, or small house

disc_obfuscate.name: Seclusion
disc_obfuscate.summary: blind a victim to all people nearby, leaving them isolated and disoriented

disc_obfuscate.name: Vanish
disc_obfuscate.summary: activate Cloak of Shadows and Unseen Passage even while under direct observation

disc_obfuscate.name: Cloak the Gathering
disc_obfuscate.summary: shelter your companions under the cloak of Obfuscate

disc_obfuscate.name: Impostor's Guise
disc_obfuscate.summary: make yourself appear as a specific individual of any build and gender

disc_oblivion.name: Ashes to Ashes
disc_oblivion.summary: use your vitae to disintegrate non-vampire corpses

disc_oblivion.name: Oblivion's Sight
disc_oblivion.summary: see in darkness and see ghosts

disc_oblivion.name: Shadow Cloak
disc_oblivion.summary: manipulate shadows for stealth or intimidation

disc_oblivion.name: The Binding Fetter
disc_oblivion.summary: identify objects and locations that are connected to ghosts

disc_oblivion.name: Arms of Ahriman
disc_oblivion.summary: conjures shadow appendages that the user can control but the user is unable to do anything else

disc_oblivion.name: Fatal Prediction
disc_oblivion.summary: foresee a mortal's likely death and exploit the omen

disc_oblivion.name: Shadow Cast
disc_oblivion.summary: summon a supernatural shadow you control

disc_oblivion.name: Where the Shroud Thins
disc_oblivion.summary: find places where ghosts can cross between worlds

disc_oblivion.name: Aura of Decay
disc_oblivion.summary: decay everything around

disc_oblivion.name: Passion Feast
disc_oblivion.summary: feed on a wraith's driving passions, briefly reducing Hunger while damaging the spirit's will

disc_oblivion.name: Shadow Perspective
disc_oblivion.summary: project senses through shadows

disc_oblivion.name: Shadow Servant
disc_oblivion.summary: detach and animate your shadow as an independent servant

disc_oblivion.name: Touch of Oblivion
disc_oblivion.summary: decay a living or unliving body

disc_oblivion.name: Necrotic Plague
disc_oblivion.summary: infect a mortal by touch with a supernatural wasting disease that may become contagious

disc_oblivion.name: Profane the Sanctified
disc_oblivion.summary: rot holy symbols or briefly smother a true believer's sacred protection

disc_oblivion.name: Stygian Shroud
disc_oblivion.summary: spread suffocating supernatural darkness over a nearby area

disc_oblivion.name: Shadow Step
disc_oblivion.summary: step into one shadow and emerge from another shadow in sight

disc_oblivion.name: Skuld Fulfilled
disc_oblivion.summary: force old injuries, illnesses, or age back onto a victim who had escaped them

disc_oblivion.name: Tenebrous Avatar
disc_oblivion.summary: become a two-dimensional shadow harmed only by fire and sunlight

disc_oblivion.name: The Darkness Within
disc_oblivion.summary: draw out a victim's violent shadow-self as a hostile double bent on destroying them

disc_oblivion.name: Withering Spirit
disc_oblivion.summary: channel entropy into a victim's spirit, causing aggravated Willpower damage and risking their soul's destruction

disc_potence.name: Fluent Strength
disc_potence.summary: when you Blood Surge to augment a Strength or Potence test, you may reroll the Rouse Check

disc_potence.name: Lethal Body
disc_potence.summary: cause serious physical damage to a mortals

disc_potence.name: Prowess
disc_potence.summary: add Potence rating to strength checks

disc_potence.name: Relentless Grasp
disc_potence.summary: add Potence as automatic successes when holding on or maintaining a grapple

disc_potence.name: Exuberance
disc_potence.summary: push Potence beyond its rating at the risk of aggravated self-inflicted strain

disc_potence.name: Spark of Rage
disc_potence.summary: add Potence to any roll to incite violence; force Vampires to make frenzy tests

disc_potence.name: Uncanny Grip
disc_potence.summary: grip and hold onto any surface, including walls and ceilings

disc_potence.name: Wrecker
disc_potence.summary: add double Potence rating to strength when destroying objects (requires 'Prowess')

disc_potence.name: Crash Down
disc_potence.summary: land from Soaring Leap with a damaging area impact

disc_potence.name: Draught of Might
disc_potence.summary: temporarily convey half your Potence power to anyone who drinks your Blood

disc_potence.name: Earthshock
disc_potence.summary: slam fist or foot into the ground, creating a shockwave that throws opponents prone

disc_potence.name: Fist of Caine
disc_potence.summary: bare hands can inflict grievous injuries, aggravated damage to both mortals and vampires

disc_potence.name: Subtle Hammer
disc_potence.summary: channel full-body strength through small movements as minor actions

disc_presence.name: Awe
disc_presence.summary: become attractive and charismatic; add Presence rating to Persuasion and Performance checks

disc_presence.name: Daunt
disc_presence.summary: push people away and intimidate; add Presence rating to Intimidation checks

disc_presence.name: Lingering Kiss
disc_presence.summary: make mortals you feed from love you

disc_presence.name: Melpominee
disc_presence.summary: use Presence powers against targets that can't see, but only hear you.

disc_presence.name: Dread Gaze
disc_presence.summary: terrify an individual, causing them to submit, freeze, flee or terror-frenzy

disc_presence.name: Entrancement
disc_presence.summary: cause infatuation, making a target do almost anything to remain in your good graces

disc_presence.name: Invigorating Display
disc_presence.summary: draw a crowd's heightened resonance into yourself after a successful performance

disc_presence.name: Passion Leech
disc_presence.summary: drain a mortal's powerful emotion to briefly feel more human while emptying them

disc_presence.name: Thrown Voice
disc_presence.summary: project your voice to anywhere you can see

disc_presence.name: True Love's Face
disc_presence.summary: appear to a victim as someone they feel strongly about, helping manipulate emotions and resonance

disc_presence.name: Inflame Desire
disc_presence.summary: magnify a touched target's current desire into a scene-long obsession

disc_presence.name: Irresistible Voice
disc_presence.summary: use your voice alone to employ Dominate powers

disc_presence.name: Suffuse the Edifice
disc_presence.summary: imbue a building with a Presence power that affects those inside

disc_presence.name: Summon
disc_presence.summary: call to yourself any person upon whom you've previously used Awe, Entrancement, or Majesty

disc_presence.name: Majesty
disc_presence.summary: amplify your countenance to supernatural levels, making everyone unable to act against you

disc_presence.name: Star Magnetism
disc_presence.summary: Presence powers affect people viewing you on live feeds or hearing you over the phone

disc_protean.name: Eyes of the Beast
disc_protean.summary: your eyes start glowing and you can see in total darkness

disc_protean.name: Squirm
disc_protean.summary: dislocate and soften your body to escape restraints or squeeze through gaps

disc_protean.name: Vicissitude
disc_protean.summary: reshape your own skin, muscles and bone at will

disc_protean.name: Fleshcrafting
disc_protean.summary: reshape another creature's flesh through Vicissitude

disc_protean.name: Masque of Death
disc_protean.summary: assume the appearance of a corpse, able to endure harm while lying still

disc_protean.name: Horrid Form
disc_protean.summary: twist your body into a monstrous battle form with enhanced physical power

disc_protean.name: Metamorphosis
disc_protean.summary: grant an additional animal form, enabling you to change your size

disc_protean.name: Bloodform
disc_protean.summary: transform into an amorphous mass of blood; immune to most weapons (not fire or sunlight); can squeeze through cracks and flow up walls; can partially reform limbs or head with a Rouse Check; can use Disciplines not requiring eye contact or speech; severed portions raise Hunger

disc_protean.name: Face of the Victim
disc_protean.summary: take on the physical appearance and voice of the last person you fed from

disc_protean.name: Master of Forms
disc_protean.summary: prerequisite: Shapechange. No longer limited to one animal form — can take any creature within the limits of Shapechange or Metamorphosis, different each time. Each specific form is always the same recognizable individual animal. All other limitations of those powers still apply.

disc_protean.name: Mist Form
disc_protean.summary: turn into a cloud of mist, perceivable but untouchable by anything save fire and sunlight

disc_protean.name: One With the Land
disc_protean.summary: sense through the land around you while merged with earth

disc_protean.name: Swarm
disc_protean.summary: dissolve into a swarm of small creatures that can attack several targets at once

disc_protean.name: The Heart of Darkness
disc_protean.summary: remove and hide your heart, making staking much harder while dulling remorse

disc_protean.name: The Unfettered Heart
disc_protean.summary: your heart detaches and moves freely within your chest, making you exceedingly hard to stake

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Far Reach
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: use your mind to grab, hold, and push objects or people without touching them

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Haze
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: create a field of mist that follows you, rendering you more difficult to target with ranged weapons

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Mercurian Tongue
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: speak the native language of the mortal whose blood fueled the formula

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Plug-In
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: generate a low electrical current to power small devices by touch

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Portable Shade
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: brew sun protection that delays daylight damage for several hours

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Profane Hieros Gamos
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: change your gender permanently through alchemical transformation

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Envelop
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: create a mist that clings to a victim, blinding them and causing suffocation in mortals

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Friends List
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: see silver threads connecting mortals to Kindred they are tied to

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Whiff-Its
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: grants heightened olfactory sense for one night; detect the Kindred with the highest Blood Potency in the area; succeed on Resolve + Awareness (Difficulty 3) to distinguish between multiple Kindred of the same Blood Potency and follow their trail

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Bleed Out
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: turn a mortal victim's blood into a gruesome shared meal for a duskborn coterie

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Chemically-Induced Flashback
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: modify Ashe with a vampire's possession to relive one of the destroyed vampire's memories

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Concoct Ashe
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: distill a destroyed vampire's ashes into Ashe, a dangerous drug that carries a trace of vampiric power

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Defractionate
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: create an elixir that returns fractionated medical-supply blood to freshness

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Mandagloire
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: emit noxious gas that paralyzes mortals and cramps supernatural creatures

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: On-Demand Sunburn
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: store a single charge of sunlight in your body to burn yourself and a target

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Rumor
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: make a target believe they freely agreed with a statement

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Saraimu
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: create a short-lived sentient slime familiar from three vampires' vitae

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Tank
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: reduce the first damage you take in a scene

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Airborne Momentum
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: lift yourself from the ground, achieving a state of swift flight or floating

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Discipline Channeling
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: modify Ashe to temporarily channel one or two Discipline powers from the destroyed vampire

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Juice Box
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: distill any thin-blood alchemy formula using methuselah vitae so that any Duskborn or Kindred can benefit from it; brew rests in a juice box for 24 hours; all activation costs, dice pools, and duration apply per the original formula

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Short Circuit
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: silently overload electronics or electrical systems by touch

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Toxic Personality
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: secrete caustic bile that corrodes materials and enhances touch attacks

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Awaken the Sleeper
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: create an elixir which, when added to human blood, can awaken a vampire from Torpor

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Beast Mode
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: temporarily gain access to a single level 5 power from Celerity, Fortitude, or Potence, treating that Discipline as 5; requires vitae of Blood Potency 4+ from a Kindred who has the power; must succeed on Willpower test (Difficulty 2) or frenzy on consumption

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Da Bomb
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: turn a mortal vessel into a delayed explosive burst of gore and aggravated damage

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Flowering Amaranth
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: share diablerie among thin-bloods to gain a first dot of a victim's clan Discipline

disc_thin_blood_alchemy.name: Moment of Clarity
disc_thin_blood_alchemy.summary: temporarily sharpen mental focus, resist mental Disciplines, and avoid bestial interference
